headline: Sabah Land Reform Proposes 450,000 Title Conversions
context: Sabah Land Reform Commission recommended converting 450,000 native title plots to full freehold potentially unlocking RM28 billion in value.

cards.big: Commission proposes converting 450,000 Sabah native titles to freehold
cards.sub: Conversion could unlock RM28 billion in previously unbankable land assets

cards.big: Current native title restricts sale transfer and mortgage of 2.1 million hectares
cards.sub: Indigenous landowners cannot use property as collateral for business loans

cards.big: Pilot in Penampang converted 3,200 titles in 2025 with 92% owner approval
cards.sub: Average property values increased 180% within 6 months of conversion

cards.big: KadazanDusun Cultural Association opposes citing ancestral land protection
cards.sub: KDCA warns freehold could enable predatory purchases by non-indigenous buyers

cards.big: Title conversion tests whether economic empowerment and cultural protection can coexist
450,000 title conversions would transform Sabah's land economy. The question is political will, not process.
